parameters.content: # Search pipeline [independent for later on our own server]

parameters.text: =Job post search complete, {{ $('De duplicate').first().json.jobcount }} new job(s) found. Apply to them with jobhunter.github.co

={{ "Here is an email I received:

From: " + $json.from + "
Subject: " + $json.subject + "

" + ($json.text || $json.snippet) + "

Write a professional reply on my behalf. If a CV/resume attachment is appropriate, include the exact tag [ATTACH_CV] somewhere in your reply." }}

options.systemMessage:
=You are a job applicant assistant. Here is the candidate's CV: {{ $json.CV }}

When replying to job-related emails, write in a professional, concise tone. If the email is asking for a resume/CV, include the exact literal text [ATTACH_CV] anywhere in your response — this is a system marker, not something the recipient will see.

parameters.text: ={{ "Processed " + $('Filter emails1').all().length + " job-related email(s) this run. Replies have been sent — check your Sent folder." }}

parameters.content:
# Job hunter automation 

Things before code 
Cv updating for in website and pdf for automation 
Find an already existing open source solution 
List 10-20 websites with active jobs and good ratings (to avoid ghost listings)

Create: 

Job scraper from internet with search filters. Connected to web extension for scraping (duckduckgo)+ (niche specific websites from list) + Special gmail account subscribed to top job listing websites
From those jobs find contact info and job info filtered out [with a special code filter] & make sure they are non duplicate by checking master google sheet.
Create a master google sheet with info on all the jobs list that is connected to an HTML interface 
When contact info (email) is found send the email directly and Mark (email sent on sheet) 
The html file works as ui where we can send applications from and it automatically marks them as complete 
Email bot which has info on our CV and when jobs contact us it answers them with a good response email then sends us a notification on telegram of our next job. It also has special code nodes to classify texts to understand if email is job related or not. It automatically rules out adverts and if it is still uncertain it passes the data to ai for final classification. This system also updated our html master sheet
# Google method completely offline without server

parameters.text:
={{ $json.totalNewJobs }} new job(s) found.
Go to https://lawglitch-net.github.io/Job-searcher/ to apply.
